name: nealhardesty-skills
description: Generic Claude Code skills for working through the lifecycle of a feature or design: stress-testing a plan, writing it up as a PRD or RFC, reviewing an RFC, and handing off a session.

plugins.name: grill
plugins.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design to stress-test it before building.

plugins.name: to-prd
plugins.description: Synthesize the current conversation into a PRD and publish it to the project's issue tracker.

plugins.name: to-rfc
plugins.description: Turn a conversation into a complete, process-conformant RFC package: README, threat model, readiness review, and warranted supplemental files.

plugins.name: rfc-review
plugins.description: Deep, adversarial review of an RFC — verifies technology claims, audits architecture/schema/API, and lists what's missing.

plugins.name: session-handoff
plugins.description: Compact the current conversation into a dated handoff document for another agent to pick up.

plugins.name: humanize
plugins.description: Rewrite a document to remove AI-generated tells, compress it, and fix common errors, while preserving every fact and mandated structure.
